name: Kathleen Frake's Fantastic Pumpkin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients and mix vigorously.
2. Divide batter into 3 to 4 greased and floured loaf pans (8 x 4-1/2 inches).
3. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Bake for 1 to 1-1/2 hours, or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
5. Let bread cool in pans on a wire rack before removing from pans.
